    toString() {

    getIntersection(other) {
        const result = [];
        let i1 = 0;
        let i2 = 0;

                i1++;
            }
            else {
                i2++;
            }
        }
        return new LineRangeSet(result);
    }
    getWithDelta(value) {
        return new LineRangeSet(this._normalizedRanges.map(r => r.delta(value)));
    }
}
